TestCase z4Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n == 0
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        // No elements to shift, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code: left circular shift (move first element to end)
    int temp = follow_case.a[0];
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n - 1; ++i) {
        follow_case.a[i] = follow_case.a[i + 1];
    }
    follow_case.a[follow_case.n - 1] = temp;
    
    return follow_case;
}
